injuries.comment: The Panthers said Gadjovich (upper body) will undergo surgery and is expected to miss about three months, Panthers TV Rinkside Reporter Katie Engleson reports Saturday.
Cirelli did not play in Wednesday's (Nov. 12) game versus the Rangers.
Hagel did not return to Wednesday's (Nov. 12) game versus the Rangers.
Hedman did not play in Wednesday's (Nov. 12) game against the Rangers.
